description: A full-stack engineer embedded with enterprise clients — building custom tooling on-site, translating business problems into working software, and owning delivery end-to-end. Equal parts engineer, consultant, and problem-solver.
core_skills: AI / LLM Integration (prompt engineering, API usage)
expected_projects: Full-stack internal tool built for a real use case (not a tutorial) — deployed and used
LLM-powered feature integrated into an existing workflow (summarization, extraction, search)
System built under time constraint with documented tradeoff decisions
Client-facing or stakeholder-ready demo with a working live deployment
Technical write-up or post-mortem showing how you diagnosed and solved a production issue
